title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 197.252 - Certificate required — standards
text:
197.252.  Certificate required — standards. — 1.  No person or other entity shall provide hospice care, or hold himself out as a hospice, unless such person has a certificate pursuant to sections 197.250 to 197.280.
  2.  All skilled care provided by a hospice shall be provided in accordance with professionally accepted standards.
(L. 1992 H.B. 899 § 2)
